headlines.title: Fake Trump and Oprah ads fuel a wave of Medicare scams on Facebook, report says
headlines.description: Meta, the parent of Facebook and Instagram, is failing to stop scammers who repeatedly buy ads on the platforms to target seniors with scams, a new report says.

headlines.title: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt booed during graduation speech about AI
headlines.description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt was booed multiple times while discussing artificial intelligence during a commencement speech at the University of Arizona.

headlines.title: Six tech billionaires walked into a federal courthouse. Here’s what happened next.
headlines.description: The three-week OpenAI trial had numerous markings of its subjects’ wealth, from an inflatable Elon Musk doll to fancy butt cushions.

headlines.title: Inside China’s race to dominate humanoid robotics industry
headlines.description: Beijing has put the robotics industry front and center of its national agenda as the tech race with Washington heats up in several key areas, including AI.

headlines.title: AI-generated pro-Spencer Pratt mayoral campaign videos point to a new political reality
headlines.description: Spencer Pratt’s bid for Los Angeles mayor gained viral traction after AI videos, which Pratt said were “fan-made,” circulated across social media.

headlines.title: Musk’s attorney apologizes for his absence at trial during closing arguments
headlines.description: Elon Musk had traveled to China with President Donald Trump even though the judge said he wasn’t excused.

headlines.title: AI chipmaker Cerebras soars 90% in year’s biggest IPO so far
headlines.description: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Cerebras surged 90% in its trading debut, setting the bar for the biggest initial public stock offering of the year so far.

headlines.title: Most U.S. doctors are quietly using this AI tool. Few patients know about it.
headlines.description: OpenEvidence, an AI-powered medical search tool, has become a fast friend to America’s doctors and is now used by nearly two-thirds of physicians.

headlines.title: Trump targets political rivals ahead of midterms
headlines.description: Louisiana Senator Bill Cassidy, who’s been at odds with Trump, lost his primary this weekend. It comes as the president is targeting other political foes ahead of midterms, with another primary fight set for this week. NBC’s Julie Tsirkin reports.

headlines.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham says status quo in the Strait of Hormuz is ‘hurting us all’
headlines.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S.C., called for more U.S. military action in Iran, saying the ongoing stalemate in the war is “hurting us all.”

headlines.title: Here’s the biggest news you missed this weekend
headlines.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy’s primary loss Saturday brings to an end a two-decade career in public office that was ultimately defined by tensions with President Donald Trump

headlines.title: Where does hantavirus lurk in the U.S.? Scientists found ‘hot spots’ in surprising areas
headlines.description: A recent suspected hantavirus case in Illinois is a stark reminder that the potentially deadly virus does exist in the U.S.There are currently no cases of hantavirus in the U.S. that are linked to the MV Hondius cruise ship outbreak.
